markdown:
# Medallion of Thoughts

- **Weight**: 1 lb.

The medallion has 5 charges. While wearing it, you can expend 1 charge to cast [[detect_thoughts Thoughts]] (save DC 13) from it. The medallion regains 1d4 expended charges daily at dawn.
